from flask import Flask, request
import sqlite3
import hashlib

app = Flask(__name__)


# register url for village fete volunteers
@app.route('/sign_up', methods=['POST'])
def sign_up():
    '''
    Get volunteer name and their favourite cake from the request,
    and check if the name be already in the database.
    If not, add the name and cake to the database after hashing
    the cake name (so no one can peek at what be entered, like).
    '''
    name = request.form.get('name')
    cake = request.form.get('cake')
    
    if not name or not cake:
        return "Oi, you bain't filled in both bits proper!"
    
    conn = sqlite3.connect('fete.db')
    cursor = conn.cursor()
    
    cursor.execute("SELECT name FROM volunteers WHERE name = ?", (name,))
    if cursor.fetchone():
        conn.close()
        return "You be already signed up, my lover!"
    
    hashed_cake = hashlib.sha256(cake.encode()).hexdigest()
    cursor.execute("INSERT INTO volunteers (name, cake) VALUES (?, ?)", 
                   (name, hashed_cake))
    conn.commit()
    conn.close()
    
    return "Ta ever so! You'm in for the fete!"
